infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pinnied uses your photo library so you can set a profile photo, pick your Pick Your 3 pictures, and share photos in Banter chats.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Pinnied uses your camera so you can take a new profile photo directly and capture photos or videos for posts and chats.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Pinnied uses the microphone when you record a video for a post or send a voice note in Banter.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Pinnied can save your share card and QR code to your photos when you tap Save.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Pinnied uses your location to show Open Games near you and to set the location when you post one.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Pinnied uses your location to show Open Games near you and to set the location when you post one.
